prompt: Generate a computer graphics scene for object detection. Include the fish from image 1 and the sponge from image 2 placed together on a clean surface. Overlay bounding boxes and class labels ('fish', 'sponge') on each object.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics scene specifically for object detection training. The scene should feature a realistic silver fish, accurately resembling the one in image 1, positioned horizontally. Alongside it, include a realistic yellow and green rectangular scrub sponge, precisely matching the one in image 2. Both objects should be clearly visible and placed side-by-side on a plain, clean, light-colored surface, such as a white or light grey tabletop, with clear, even lighting. Overlay distinct axis-aligned bounding boxes around each object, with the text label 'fish' for the fish and 'sponge' for the sponge.
objects: realistic silver fish (resembling image 1, positioned horizontally)
realistic yellow and green rectangular scrub sponge (matching image 2)
plain, clean, light-colored surface (such as a white or light grey tabletop)
axis-aligned bounding box around the fish
axis-aligned bounding box around the sponge
